?? experiments/dpf_implementation/

scaling_and_epsilon_match_ledger.bayesfilter_epsilon_schedule: similar_not_matched: fixed target epsilon for 100 log-domain iterations
scaling_and_epsilon_match_ledger.consequence: consistent decision forbidden unless match_status is matched
scaling_and_epsilon_match_ledger.filterflow_cost_formula: squared distance / 2 on scaled particle cloud
scaling_and_epsilon_match_ledger.filterflow_epsilon_schedule: epsilon_0=max_min(scaled_x, scaled_x)^2, geometric decrease by scaling^2 to target epsilon
scaling_and_epsilon_match_ledger.filterflow_scale_formula: diameter(x, x) * sqrt(dimension), diameter=max coordinate std with zero fallback

seed_protocol.common_random_numbers_across_bayesfilter: partial: same seed base, method-specific random consumption differs after resampling
seed_protocol.data_seed: batched stateless normal tensors keyed by DATA_SEED_BASE and time/noise salt
seed_protocol.filter_seed: batched stateless normal tensors keyed by FILTER_SEED_BASE, method salt, and time/noise salt
